item.title: 3 killed in shooting at Islamic Center of San Diego, police say; 2 suspects dead
item.description: Three people were killed in a shooting at the Islamic Center of San Diego, and two suspected shooters were found dead inside a vehicle nearby, police said.

item.title: Trump admin. proposes admitting thousands more Afrikaners to U.S. as refugees
item.description: The Trump administration is doubling down on efforts to resettle White Afrikaners from South Africa as refugees, proposing to increase the government's refugee cap to welcome thousands more of them, according to a plan obtained by CBS News.

item.title: LIRR strike to end as MTA, unions reach tentative agreement
item.description: New York Gov. Kathy Hochul said the MTA and LIRR unions reached "a fair deal" to end the strike after three days.

item.title: Mom reported son missing along with weapons and car before Islamic Center shooting, police say
item.description: Police held a news conference Monday evening to give an update on the deadly shooting at the Islamic Center of San Diego. Authorities say the two suspects killed three others before being found dead in a nearby vehicle.

item.title: Fast-fashion retailer Shein to buy Everlane for $500 million, Puck reports
item.description: Fast-fashion giant Shein is about to get even bigger. Over the weekend, the Chinese-owned retailer approved plans to buy American brand Everlane for $100 million, according to Puck. Lauren Sherman, CBS News contributor and fashion correspondent for Puck, joins with the details.

item.title: Many Americans express frustrations with economy in new CBS News polling
item.description: New CBS News polling shows a large number of Americans are concerned about their finances and a growing number of people are expressing negative overall views of the U.S. economy. CBS News executive director of elections and surveys Anthony Salvanto breaks down the findings.

item.title: Breaking down what can and can't be used as evidence in Luigi Mangione's state murder trial
item.description: Luigi Mangione appeared in court on Monday for a pivotal hearing where a judge ruled what items can and cannot be used as evidence in his upcoming state murder trial over the killing of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson. CBS News legal reporter Katrina Kaufman was inside the courtroom.

item.title: Americans growing more frustrated with Trump's approach to economy, CBS News poll finds
item.description: CBS News polling finds Americans are growing more frustrated with the economy as the war with Iran keeps gas prices high. CBS News correspondent Natalie Brand reports.

item.title: Legal analysis after Musk loses lawsuit against OpenAI over statute of limitations
item.description: A California jury on Monday unanimously dismissed Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI and its top executives. CBS News legal contributor Jessica Levinson breaks down the case.

item.title: 500 firefighters battling Sandy Fire in California's Simi Valley
item.description: A massive brush fire burning in Simi Valley, California, has prompted mandatory evacuations and burned at least 720 acres as of Monday evening. CBS News chief correspondent Matt Gutman reports.

item.title: Eric Church compares pillars of life to strings on a guitar in viral commencement speech
item.description: Country singer Eric Church delivered a powerful speech to new graduates of UNC Chapel Hill. Tony Dokoupil has the story.

item.title: Judge rules some evidence allegedly found in Luigi Mangione's backpack can be used in state trial
item.description: A judge on Monday ruled a 9 millimeter gun, a silencer and a red notebook allegedly found in the search of Luigi Mangione's possessions can be used as evidence in his state trial for the murder of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson in September. Lilia Luciano has more.

item.title: Florida mother turns to digital couponing as grocery bill soars
item.description: With inflation hitting its highest point since 2023, Kiana Powell told CBS News, "I cannot let a deal go to waste if it's something that I am using daily."

item.title: How a mom tries to stretch the grocery budget for her family of 5 | Affordability in America
item.description: Each trip to the grocery store is becoming more expensive for Florida mother Kiana Powell. Cristian Benavides reports on how she's trying to stretch her budget.

item.title: Massie defiant as Trump seeks to oust him in primary: "I'm going to win"
item.description: Massie said the president is worried about his preferred candidate Ed Gallrein's chances in the Kentucky race.

item.title: Hegseth campaigns against Massie in Kentucky with primary a day away
item.description: Pete Hegseth hit the campaign trail Monday, an unusual move for a defense secretary, stumping in Kentucky for Ed Gallrein, a Trump-backed challenger to Republican congressman and frequent Trump critic Thomas Massie. Ed O'Keefe has more.

item.title: American doctor working in Congo tests positive for Ebola
item.description: An American medical missionary in the Democratic Republic of the Congo has a confirmed case of Ebola, and is being taken to Germany for treatment.

item.title: U.S. announces Ebola-related travel restrictions amid outbreak in Congo, Uganda
item.description: The Trump administration announced it's restricting people who don't have U.S. passports from entering the country if they have been in Congo, South Sudan or Uganda amid the Ebola outbreak.

item.title: At least 6 Americans in Congo were exposed to Ebola virus, sources say
item.description: The World Health Organization this week declared the Ebola outbreak in Congo and Uganda a "public health emergency of international concern."

item.title: Ebola strain in latest outbreak has no vaccine, no treatment
item.description: The virus behind the latest Ebola outbreak is the Bundibugyo virus, which is less common and there is no vaccine or treatment.

item.title: Ebola outbreak in Congo and Uganda declared global health emergency
item.description: At least 80 deaths have been reported in a new Ebola disease outbreak in Congo and Uganda, authorities said.

item.title: Latest on American who contracted Ebola as outbreak continues in Congo, Uganda
item.description: A missionary doctor who was serving in Congo will receive treatment in Germany after testing positive for Ebola. Skyler Henry has the latest.

item.title: Evacuations underway as wildfire burns in California's Simi Valley
item.description: A fast-moving wildfire about 40 miles north of Los Angeles forced evacuations Monday. Matt Gutman has more.

item.title: Details: 3 adults killed, 2 suspects also dead in shooting at Islamic Center of San Diego
item.description: Police say three adults were killed when two shooters opened fire Monday at the Islamic Center of San Diego. Jonathan Vigliotti has more.

item.title: New York Times sues Pentagon a second time over press access policy
item.description: The New York Times sued the Defense Department Monday for the second time in recent months over media access.

item.title: Who could benefit from Trump's $1.7+ billion "anti-weaponization" fund?
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche announced the creation of the fund as part of the settlement of President Trump's lawsuit against the IRS over the leaking of his tax returns.

item.title: Day 3 of LIRR strike brings no clear sign of a deal as NYC commuters cope
item.description: LIRR commuters are taking shuttle buses and subways into New York City as the largest commuter rail system in North America remains shut down.

item.title: Divers find bodies of 4 Italians in Maldives sea cave
item.description: Italy's Foreign Ministry said Monday rescuers located the bodies of four Italian divers who were believed to be deep inside an underwater cave in a Maldive atoll.

item.title: New dinosaur weighing as much as 9 elephants identified by scientists
item.description: The long-necked herbivore is the largest ever found in Southeast Asia, researchers said.

item.title: 5/14: The Takeout with Major Garrett
item.description: Xi lays out warning for Trump on Taiwan; Chinese Americans discuss hopes for summit.
